task: Analyze the embedded valve-timing evidence packet and produce a launch-quality FMEA evidence packet: a reproducible workbook (valve_timing_fmea.xlsx) that preserves all intermediate calculations or an executable script, plus a concise expert-review memo (risk_acceptance.md). Use only the embedded packet data and the provided rules. Compute margin = metric4 - (0.35*metric1 + 0.25*metric2 + 0.15*metric3); mark any record with negative margin as FAIL; mark any record with margin below 8% of the largest driver as WARN. Flag any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Rank failure modes with required mitigations, include record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes (using sensitivity_shift_pct), and a final recommendation table within the memo. Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions.
